title: tragopogon sabulosus
intro: Tragopogon sabulosus, also known as the sandy salsify or dune salsify, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Tragopogon sabulosus include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Traditionally, the plant has been used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health issues.
